column1: # mapping_set_title: NIST AI 100-1 - SSSOM mapping set
#   Mappings between NIST AI Risk Management Framework (NIST AI 100-1)
#   schema elements and related concepts (NIST CSF v2, NIST SP 800-53,
#   OSCAL catalog/profile, ISO 27001, ISO 29100, GIST core) plus core

column7: comment
Generic root class; both are top-level abstractions.
Root container of an AI RMF document; analogous to CSF document root.
Both are top-level structured catalogs of framework outcomes.
NIST SP 800-53 catalog is the analogous structure for SP 800-53 controls.
Publication metadata for the framework document.
General published document concept.
Both express top-level framework Functions (e.g., GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE / GOVERN, IDENTIFY, PROTECT, DETECT, RESPOND, RECOVER).
gist_linkml:Function is a generic "activity an item is intended to perform"; related but generic.
Both are second-level framework groupings within a Function.
Both are leaf-level outcome statements.
An OSCAL Control is the analogous outcome-bearing leaf in OSCAL catalogs.
NIST SP 800-53 Control is a leaf-level statement.
Both designate framework profiles tailored to context.
OSCAL-style profile document.
Composite of likelihood and impact; aligned with ISO 31000 / 27001 definition the AI RMF adapts.
Privacy-specific risk; related but narrower in scope.
Residual risk is a narrower (post-treatment) specialisation of Risk.
Both express acceptable risk ranges; RiskLevel is a qualitative rating.
ImpactRating is a qualitative scale of an Impact - narrower (rating subtype).
iso27001:Risk is the broader, technology-agnostic risk concept.
An AI system is a kind of software application (Schema.org).
PROV Agent covers actors that perform activities and bear responsibility - close to OECD AI Actor.
FOAF Agent covers persons, organisations, and groups - matches AI Actor scope.
STIX Identity represents actors (individuals, orgs, classes); related.
An interested party in ISO 27001 plays an analogous role in the management system.
Loosely related: both touch on fairness/equity expectations.
Indirect: human-AI interaction concerns involve interested parties.
Both are descriptive properties of the framework itself.
Each Playbook entry enriches a Subcategory; conceptually parallel.
The free-text outcome statement of a category/subcategory; CSF stores prose similarly.
Same enumerated treatment options (modify / accept / share / avoid).
Both express likelihood of occurrence.
Magnitude of consequence; ISO 27001 uses an explicit rating type.
